nasb.text: They will go with their flocks and herds To seek the Lord, but they will not find Him; He has withdrawn from them.

esv.text: With their flocks and herds they shall go to seek the Lord, but they will not find him; he has withdrawn from them.

cnv.text: 雖然他們帶著牛群羊群 去尋求耶和華，卻尋不見； 他已經離開他們遠去了。

ccb.text: 他们牵着牛羊去寻求耶和华， 却寻不到， 因为祂已离他们而去。
